notifications.pushDescriptionDesktop: Push notifications are delivered to the mobile app when you are idle or offline. These settings sync across your devices.
notifications.pushDescriptionMobile: Sent to your phone when you are idle or offline. DMs support quick reply from the notification shade.
notifications.idleTimeoutDescription: Automatically mark yourself as idle after this long without keyboard or mouse input
notifications.idleDesktopOnly: Idle detection is only available in the desktop app.
notifications.dndSuppressNote: Do Not Disturb and Invisible always suppress push notifications.
notifications.dndDescriptionMobile: Set your status to Do Not Disturb or Invisible to suppress push notifications regardless of these toggles. While you are online and active, notifications stay in the app instead.
notifications.presenceDescriptionMobile: Idle detection on desktop automatically marks you as idle after inactivity. On mobile, use your status picker to set Online, Idle, Do Not Disturb, or Invisible - including timed durations.

account.dangerZoneDescription: Permanently deactivate your account. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteAccountConfirm: This permanently deactivates your account. Type your username and password to confirm.

appearance.iconsDescriptionMobile: Home screen icon snaps to the nearest bundled color variant.
appearance.spellcheckDescription: Underline misspelled words and show suggestions in the right-click menu

voice.title: Voice
voice.speaker: Speaker
voice.inputDevicesDescription: Choose which microphone to use in voice channels.
voice.inputModeDescription: Choose whether your microphone activates automatically or only while you hold the push-to-talk button in voice channels.
voice.pushToTalkHint: While in a voice channel, hold the microphone button in the user bar to transmit.
voice.autoSensitivityDescription: Let Mutualzz decide when your mic activates
voice.voiceActivityDescription: Your microphone only transmits while you are speaking. Adjust sensitivity if voice detection feels too sensitive or not sensitive enough.
voice.sensitivityPttOnly: Sensitivity settings apply only in voice activity mode.
voice.perUserVolumeDescription: While in a voice channel, use the volume slider on each participant to adjust how loud they sound for you. These settings are saved on this device.
voice.cameraDescription: Camera works in voice channels on mobile. Screen share remains desktop-only for now.

expressions.name: Name
expressions.emojiLimitDesktop: Sadly current limit of emojis you can upload are 100, since the app is in beta and storage is an issue for now
expressions.stickerLimitDesktop: Sadly current limit of stickers you can upload are 100, since the app is in beta and storage is an issue for now

profile.avatarStudioDescriptionDesktop: Open the full editor for upload, drawing, and previews — or jump in quickly below.
profile.avatarStudioDescriptionMobile: Upload a new avatar or jump in quickly below.
profile.methodUploadDescriptionDesktop: Use a photo or GIF from your device.
profile.methodUploadDescriptionMobile: Use a photo or GIF from your library.
profile.methodDrawDescription: Sketch a custom avatar on the canvas.
profile.methodAvatarsDescription: Pick a default style or restore a previous one.
profile.profilePageDescription: Customize your MySpace-style page with blocks, banner, bio, and profile music.
profile.displayNameDescription: Update how your name appears across Mutualzz.
profile.previewDescription: How your avatar appears across Mutualzz.
profile.currentAvatarDescription: Preview your current avatar before switching to another upload or preset.
profile.avatarPresetsDescription: Reuse a previous avatar from your saved history.

editor.mobileDescription: Edit your profile page content and block layout.
editor.panelsOverlapHint: Panels may overlap blocks · click Preview to see the full canvas
editor.leaveDescription: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, your changes will be lost.
editor.resetDescription: This removes your bio, banner, background, profile music, and all blocks. Your account avatar and username are not affected. This cannot be undone.

viewer.emptySelfTitle: You haven't set up your profile yet
viewer.emptySelfDescription: Customize your profile with blocks, a banner, bio, and more.
viewer.emptyOtherTitle: User hasn't setup their profile yet
viewer.emptyOtherDescription: Check back later to see their customized profile page.
viewer.emptyMobile: This user hasn't set up their mobile profile yet.
viewer.title: Profile
viewer.previewExpiredHint: Return to the editor and preview again.
viewer.nothingPublishedUntilSave: Nothing is published until you save

music.waitingToType: Waiting for you to finish typing…
music.typeAtLeast: Type at least {{min}} characters to search

blocks.rolesNeedSharedSpace: Join a shared space to display roles

widgets.emptyEditor: Add your first widget below to start customizing your mobile profile.

validation.emptyImages_one: Remove or upload images for {{count}} image widget before saving
validation.emptyImages_other: Remove or upload images for {{count}} image widgets before saving
validation.emptyStickers_one: Choose stickers for {{count}} sticker widget before saving
validation.emptyStickers_other: Choose stickers for {{count}} sticker widgets before saving
validation.emptyLinks_one: Add at least one link to {{count}} links widget before saving
validation.emptyLinks_other: Add at least one link to {{count}} links widgets before saving

inspector.title: Customize
inspector.subtitle: Page settings and selected block
inspector.pageFontDescription: Visitors see this font on your profile page and profile popout.
inspector.clickBlockToEdit: Click a block on the canvas to edit it
inspector.bannerHint: Shown in your profile header block. Crop and height can be tuned when the header block is selected.
inspector.backgroundColorDescription: Use a solid color or gradient for your profile background.
inspector.profileMusicHint: Upload an MP3 or paste a YouTube / Apple Music link for full song playback.
inspector.wavNotSupported: WAV files are not supported. Please upload an MP3.
inspector.headerSizeHint: Drag the block edges on the canvas to change overall header size. Use the sliders to tune banner height and vertical crop.
inspector.blockMusicHint: Upload an MP3 or paste a YouTube link for full song playback.
inspector.activityHint: Shows live presence and current activity from the user's status. No configuration needed — updates automatically.
inspector.rolesHint: Displays roles from a shared space. Viewers see roles from spaces they share with this user.
inspector.headerWidgetHint: Shows your avatar, name, banner, and bio on the larger size.
inspector.cropHint: Use Adjust crop to choose which part of the image shows in the widget. Full view always shows the original image.

validation.emptyImages_one: Remove or upload images for {{count}} image block before saving
validation.emptyImages_other: Remove or upload images for {{count}} image blocks before saving
validation.emptyStickers_one: Choose stickers for {{count}} sticker block before saving
validation.emptyStickers_other: Choose stickers for {{count}} sticker blocks before saving
validation.emptyLinks_one: Add at least one link to {{count}} links block before saving
validation.emptyLinks_other: Add at least one link to {{count}} links blocks before saving
validation.bioTooLong: Bio must be at most 512 characters

draw.drawDraftsDescription: Pick up a saved sketch or continue editing one below.

presets.previousAutoSaveHint: Your last 9 avatars will be saved here automatically.

draw.canvasHint: Draw by dragging a finger across this area.

fonts.searchPlaceholder: Search fonts or type a Google Font name…
fonts.signInToUpload: Sign in to upload a custom font
fonts.pangram: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
fonts.label: Font
fonts.uploadHint: TTF, OTF, WOFF, or WOFF2, up to 5 MB. Loads on demand when your theme or profile is viewed.

details.themeNameDescription: A unique name for your theme
details.themeDescriptionHint: A brief description of your theme
details.adaptiveThemeDescription: Auto-derive surface and text colors from a base palette

colors.backgroundDescription: The background color of the app
colors.surfaceDescription: This color gets applied to cards, sheets, and menus
colors.surfaceInfo: it automatically adapts to certain UI elements
colors.surfaceEmbossedHint: If you prefer using embossed style, I recommend modifying this color
colors.blackDescription: The color to use for text and icons on a light background
colors.whiteDescription: The color to use for text and icons on a dark background
colors.baseColorDescription: The base color of the app
colors.primaryDescription: Usually used to indicate the primary action or important elements
colors.primaryIconsHint: Auto-generated icons derive from this color
colors.neutralDescription: Usually used to indicate a neutral or inactive state
colors.successDescription: Usually used to indicate a successful or positive action
colors.dangerDescription: Usually used to indicate errors and failure within the app
colors.warningDescription: Usually used to indicate caution and requires user attention
colors.infoDescription: Usually used to indicate additional information
colors.appFontDescription: Applies across the app when this theme is active. Fonts load on demand.
colors.appFontDescriptionShort: Applies across the app when this theme is active.
colors.primaryTextHint: Usually white-ish is used on dark backgrounds, black-ish on light backgrounds
